title: Communauté de communes du Canton de Forges-les-Eaux
summary: The Communauté de communes du Canton de Forges-les-Eaux was located in the Seine-Maritime département of the Normandy region of northern France. It was created in December 2001. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes des 4 rivières in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes du Canton de Forges-les-Eaux was located in the Seine-Maritime département of the Normandy region of northern France. It was created in December 2001. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes des 4 rivières in January 2017.

Participants
The Communauté de communes comprised the following communes:
